name: 📈 Binance Trader
description: Crypto trading desk on Binance Futures testnet: market data (klines/funding), account (balance/positions/orders), execution (order/close/stop/leverage/cancel), income/PnL, monitoring loop with alerts, and a guarded auto-trade engine. v0.8 adds a DYNAMIC LEVERAGE GUARDRAIL (Option B): maxLeverage is now a 20x ceiling, and effective leverage is auto-capped by stop width so liquidation stays ≥1.5× the stop away — stop ≤3%→20x · 3–4%→15x · 4–6%→10x · >6%→7x — applied uniformly across manual order, autotrade, and auto-signal; rejects only when even the lowest tier can't clear the buffer. v0.7 unifies %-risk position sizing across ALL paths (qty = equity×risk%/stopDist, default 0.5% ≈ $25). Notional backstop = 100% of equity (~$5000). Testnet-only with notional cap + leverage guardrail + daily loss limit + audit log.

commands.name: status
commands.desc: Check connection: testnet/mainnet, base URL, keys set, trading + autoTrade enabled?

commands.name: price
commands.desc: Current price for a symbol, e.g. price BTCUSDT (public, no key)

commands.name: ticker
commands.desc: 24h ticker (change%, high, low, volume) for a symbol (public, no key)

commands.name: klines
commands.desc: Candlestick history for TA. e.g. klines BTCUSDT 1h 100. Public, no key

commands.name: funding
commands.desc: Mark price + funding rate (premiumIndex). e.g. funding BTCUSDT. Public

commands.name: balance
commands.desc: Futures account balances (testnet — requires API key)

commands.name: positions
commands.desc: Open futures positions with unrealized PnL + leverage (requires key)

commands.name: openorders
commands.desc: Currently resting (unfilled) orders (requires key)

commands.name: order
commands.desc: Place a testnet order (MANUAL). Explicit qty: order BTCUSDT BUY 0.001. Or %-risk sizing: order BTCUSDT BUY risk 59700 (qty = equity×0.5%/stopDist). MARKET if no @price, LIMIT if @price.

commands.name: autotrade
commands.desc: Gated auto-execution: runs autoTradeGuard (autoTrade on + cap + daily loss + grade + no-averaging) then places order + mandatory stop. e.g. autotrade BTCUSDT BUY 0.001 B 59000 @60000

commands.name: close
commands.desc: Flatten any open position on a symbol at market (close BTCUSDT)

commands.name: stoploss
commands.desc: STOP-MARKET that closes the position if price crosses the trigger. Auto-detects side (also take-profit)

commands.name: leverage
commands.desc: Set initial leverage (guarded by maxLeverage cap). e.g. leverage BTCUSDT 3

commands.name: cancel
commands.desc: Cancel a resting order

commands.name: trades
commands.desc: Recent fill history (userTrades). e.g. trades BTCUSDT 50

commands.name: income
commands.desc: Funding/realized PnL since start of today. type: REALIZED_PNL|FUNDING_FEE|COMMISSION. Paginated

commands.name: scan
commands.desc: Scan the whole watchlist for market-structure opportunities (HH/HL/LH/LL fractals + pullback gate, 15m entry + 1h context). Returns ranked signals with entry/stop/target + grade A/B/C + structure/pullback fields. Advisory — does not trade.

commands.name: positions-manage
commands.desc: Manage tracked positions + auto-exit. status = see active; close = manual exit; target/trail = update params. The monitor loop auto-exits on target/trail/time-stop.

commands.name: pause
commands.desc: Toggle the trading kill-switch (blocks order + autotrade). Bare pause = toggle. Also reachable as POST /plugin/binance/pause from the dashboard (token-gated).

commands.name: audit
commands.desc: Show recent order history (last 20 from the audit log)
